title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map caught up
gist.blurb: The API reference has been regenerated from the live OpenAPI spec. Fewer stale breadcrumbs in the garden.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the current production OpenAPI specification so the published API reference matches deployed behavior.
gist.impact: Developers get an up-to-date API reference when building against pollinations.ai endpoints.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy documentation garden where Polly compares a freshly printed API map with a glowing retro terminal, while code-vines and labeled endpoint flowers show that the reference has caught up with production.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and tiny librarian glasses, carefully updating a large API map beside a lime green (#ecf874) glowing retro terminal; code-plants and endpoint-shaped flowers grow from warm cream pots nearby. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, subtle pixel-font text: 'API DOCS', emotionally warm and nostalgic.
